description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- Upgrade Memory v5 outcome signals, injected split, and learnings export / 升级 Memory v5 成败信号、注入分桶统计与 learnings 导出 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6160
- fix(desktop): self-heal project re-add roots by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6158
- Surface stable Memory v5 learnings as memory candidates in settings / 将 Memory v5 稳定学习成果提炼为设置页记忆候选 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6162
- Bound lossy slugs and tail-read append-only logs / 限长有损 slug 并尾读追加日志 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6165
- Dock run state into the composer card and add prompt-card previews / 运行态内嵌输入卡与审批 · 提问卡预览行 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6164
- fix(frontend): Reduce startup performance lag false positives by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6177
- Fix TUI session recovery lease tracking / 修复 TUI 会话恢复 lease 跟随 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6176
- Hide legacy recovery topics from desktop sidebar / 隐藏旧恢复分支侧栏话题 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6168
- fix(desktop): compact backend notices in chat by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6174
- Add real-page notice preview mock by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6183
- Redact secret-bearing tool output / 脱敏工具输出中的密钥 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6182
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.17.7...desktop-v1.17.8
